name: Saffron Risotto Primavera (c) (Lacto)
recipeInstructions:
1. A traditional Italian way to cook rice which results in a creamy side dish. Best served hot, as this dish doesn't wait.
2. Cook mushrooms, zucchini, and red bell peppers until tender crisp in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Remove vegetables; set aside.
3. Cook onions in the same skillet until soft.
4. Add rice and saffron to the pan; stir for 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Add white wine and stir until absorbed.
6. Stir in stock. Cook, uncovered, stirring frequently, until the stock is absorbed.
7. Continue stirring and add 1 cup of water, allowing the first cup to be absorbed before adding the second.
8. Cook until rice is tender and the mixture has a creamy consistency. This will take approximately 25 to 30 minutes.
9. Stir in cheese, parsley, white pepper, and reserved vegetables. Serve immediately.
